text: Jabse unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, mere sar mein aisa bhari-pan rehne laga hai jaise koi lohe ki hatheli dabba rahi ho. Joint family mein 'achi bahu' banne ke chakkar mein itni thakan rehti hai ki ab saans lene mein bhi takleef hoti hai. Main ro kar apna dard nahi baant sakti kyunki hamare samaj mein rona kamzori hai, isliye bas acidity aur chest tightness ki shikayat karti hoon.

Unka ye kehna ki main badal gayi hoon sunkar mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan hone lagi hai aur khana hazam hi nahi hota. Saas ke saath kalesh aur career gap ka dukh toh tha hi, ab ye naya darr kandhon mein itni jakdan deta hai ki hila nahi jata. Main chup rehti hoon taaki ghar ki 'izzat' bani rahe, par ye sir dard mera peecha hi nahi chhodta.

Partner ki baat sunkar mera dum ghutne laga hai aur tabse meri hatheliyon mein paseena aata rehta hai aur dil ki dhadkan badh jati hai. Child pressure aur lost identity ka bojh itna hai ki poore sharir mein ajeeb si kampann hoti rehti hai. 'Mard nahi rota' wali baat hum aurton pe bhi lagti hai ki humein bhi hamesha sakht dikhna hai, isliye bas thakan ka bahana banakar so jati hoon.

Shehar ke tanno ke baad se mere gale mein hamesha kuch atka sa mehsus hota hai aur aawaz bhari ho gayi hai. Main bas ek ideal homemaker banna chahti hoon par ye peeth ka dard itna 'shiddat' ka hai ki kitchen ka kaam karna mushkil ho gaya hai. Log kahenge ki bahu nakhre kar rahi hai, par ye sharir ki tootan kisi ko kaise dikhau?

Jabse unhone badalne ki baat ki hai, meri aankhon mein hamesha jalan rehti hai aur neend bilkul ud gayi hai. Career chhodne ka malaal aur joint family ki restrictions ki wajah se mere poore badan mein ajeeb si suiyan chubhti hain. Main rona nahi chahti kyunki 'izzat' ka sawal hai, isliye bas migraine ki painkiller kha kar din nikaal rahi hoon.
